race.comment: NAVY KISS (3) finished midfield at his first start last time out over 1150m at Gold Coast Poly, 3.5 lengths from the winner in fourth. Stretches out in trip and expected to go well. DANCING TILDA (1) progressed nicely last start to finish a close third over 1412m at Taree. Should be further improved and can figure in the finish. GENERAL GORDON (4) has not raced since his debut back on November 3 when he finished sixth over 1250m at Ballina. Will be better for that run.Placed in a recent trial at Beaudesert and is a leading contender. FUTURE HERO (9) ran midfield last start at Gold Coast Poly. Is up in distance today and has placed here previously.
